message.content: @startuml skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center actor "참가자" as participant1 participant "깃헙 리포지토리\nGitHub Repository" as repository2 #D3D8FF participant "운영자\nOperator" as operator4 #F9E7A6 database "데이터베이스\ndatabase" as db5 #B0CBEF box PR #LightBlue participant "" as github_action_gha_pr_participant end box rectangle GHA_PR { note right of participant1 :GHA 챌린지 완료 인증샷 github_action_gpr ->>repository2:PR 생성 repository2->github_action_gha_pr_participant:이벤트 발생 note left of github_action_gha_pr_participant:#bcebcf 라벨 추가: review-required } note over participant1 ,db5:REVIEW 과정 \n- 운영자가 리뷰를 진행합니다.\n - 기록을 확인하고 업데이트 합니다. \n - 참가자에게 이메일로 결과를 통보합니다. group REVIEW 리뷰 프로세스{ operator4-->operator4:리뷰 repositry_review <- operator4:nlabel add:review-completed repositry_review <-- operator4:d label delete:review-required comment on link repositry_review -->> operator4:"/ghasignoff"" event_generation_rv<- operator4:event generation alt [record exists] db_record_update -->db5:update record else[no records exist ] comment below event_generation_rv:no update required for this case end alt group EMAIL_NOTIFICATIONSEmail Notifications Process:{ email_notification_process() } function email_notifications(){ send_email_to_user(email_address,message_content); log_sent_emails(log_entry_details ); return true; };
